title: A Trip to the Beach
summary: Past simple, narrative — a day at the beach.
text:
Last Saturday my family and I went to the beach. We left home at nine in the morning. The drive was one hour. The sun was hot and the sky was blue.

At the beach, my brother and I swam in the sea. The water was cold but we had fun. My mother sat under an umbrella and read a book. My father took photos of everything.

For lunch we ate sandwiches and fruit. We drank lemonade. After lunch, my sister built a sandcastle. It was very big.

In the afternoon, we played football on the sand. We were tired but happy. We came home at seven. I slept very well that night.

questions.q: When did the family go to the beach?
What did they eat for lunch?
What did they do in the afternoon?
How did the narrator feel at the end?
